description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a low-profile, rectangular platform frame in a light color, likely white or light gray. The bed is topped with a dark, textured comforter that drapes over the sides and foot, creating a slightly rumpled appearance. Two large, white pillows rest at the head of the bed, adding contrast to the darker bedding. The frame appears solid and minimalistic, with no visible legs or under-bed clearance, suggesting a platform design. There is no visible headboard or footboard, giving the bed a sleek, contemporary look. The overall aesthetic is clean and functional, suitable for urban interiors or staged environments.
description: A modern, low-profile double bed with a dark comforter, white pillows, and a minimalist platform frame. The design is sleek and headboard-free, with bedding draped over the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bed's low platform frame, dark comforter, and two white pillows at the head.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the pillows and the draped comforter extending toward the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the comforter and pillows visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the pillows and the even spread of the comforter, with the frame's clean lines visible.
